creator: aldis@bsdroot.lv
text:
I fixed some of things you mentioned, but not all.
If I remove *_LIBRARY_DIR and *_INCLUDE_DIR from CMakeLists.txt, then  
linking fails, because it can't find freetype library...

http://git.bsdroot.lv/graphics/VisualizationLibrary/
http://git.bsdroot.lv/graphics/VisualizationLibrary/snapshot/VisualizationLibrary-3.tar.gz

What do you think?
-- 
Aldis Berjoza
